raw.advertiser_name: 윈조이 포커 - 블랙잭, 바카라, 슬롯, 로우바둑이

hook.summary: A slot machine spin leads to a jackpot win with a curiosity-inducing headline.
hook.visual_action: The slot reels spin and land on three '7' symbols, triggering a gold coin explosion and a 'JACKPOT' banner.

scene_flow: Slot machine reels spin with various fruit symbols visible.
The reels land on three '7' symbols, triggering a 'JACKPOT' animation with falling gold coins.
A transition screen appears with text asking if the viewer is the next winner over a background of coins.
Final end card displays the 'WINJOY POKER' logo and a download button.
on_screen_text: 9 different symbols in a single spin awards the Free Game
audience_proxy: Adults who enjoy social casino games and the excitement of high-stakes jackpot wins.
